steps.title: Derive the perimeter constraint
steps.content:
For a rectangle with perimeter 26 m:
$$2x + 2y = 26$$
Dividing by 2: $x + y = 13$
This linear equation describes every point on the graph.

steps.title: Interpret point (4, 9)
steps.content:
The point $(4, 9)$ has $x = 4$ and $y = 9$. Since the problem defines $x$ as length and $y$ as width:
  • Length = 4 m
  • Width = 9 m
Verify: $4 + 9 = 13$ ✓, confirming it satisfies the perimeter constraint. That matches choice C — C is correct.
